name: Geoportal Bayern (Bavarian SDI)
dataType: Topography, cadastre (ALKIS), orthophotos, DEM, land use, nature conservation, geology, monument protection
description: Central access point for Bavaria's geodata infrastructure providing free open geodata including ALKIS cadastre, ATKIS Basis-DLM, orthophotos (DOP20), and topographic maps via the OpenData portal geodaten.bayern.de.

name: GEOportal.NRW (North Rhine-Westphalia SDI)
dataType: Cadastre (ALKIS), topography (ATKIS), orthophotos, 3D city models, elevation models, land use
formats: Shapefile, NAS, GeoTIFF, CityGML, GeoJSON, GML
description: NRW state geoportal providing over 2,500 datasets including free geobase data, 3D building models, and ALKIS/ATKIS data with an Open Data Download Client at opengeodata.nrw.de.

name: Geoportal Baden-Wuerttemberg
dataType: Cadastre, topographic maps, orthophotos, DEM, administrative boundaries, land use
description: Baden-Wuerttemberg state geoportal with 1,382 datasets and open geodata download via opengeodata.lgl-bw.de including orthophotos, topographic maps, and cadastral boundaries.

name: Geoportal Sachsenatlas (Saxony SDI)
dataType: Topographic maps, aerial images, elevation models, city models, landscape models, cadastre
description: Saxony's central geoportal and open geodata platform providing free access to topographic maps, aerial images, elevation and 3D city models from the GDI Sachsen since September 2019.

name: Geoportal Hessen
operator: Hessische Verwaltung fuer Bodenmanagement und Geoinformation (HVBG)
dataType: Cadastre (ALKIS), topography (ATKIS), orthophotos, DEM, real estate valuation data
description: Central geoportal of Hesse's geodata infrastructure providing free access to geobase data and real estate valuation data since February 2022 under the Datenlizenz Deutschland.

name: LBEG NIBIS Kartenserver (Lower Saxony Soil Information System)
operator: Landesamt fuer Bergbau, Energie und Geologie (LBEG)
dataType: Soil science, geology, hydrogeology, geothermal energy, groundwater, erosion, engineering geology, contaminated sites, raw materials
description: Lower Saxony's geological survey map server providing about 400 thematic maps on soil, geology, hydrogeology, geothermal energy, groundwater, erosion, and contaminated sites including 3D geological models.

name: BGR Produktcenter (Federal Geosciences Geodata)
dataType: Geology, soil science, geophysics, mineral resources, energy resources, groundwater, engineering geology, geochemistry
description: Central metadata and download portal for all BGR geodata covering German geology, soil, groundwater, geophysics, and mineral resources with free WMS services and direct download.

name: BfN Geodienste (Federal Nature Conservation Geodata)
dataType: Protected areas, Natura 2000 (FFH, SPA), national parks, biosphere reserves, nature reserves, landscape conservation areas, valuable landscapes, marine protected areas
description: Harmonized national protected area datasets compiled annually from all 16 federal states covering Natura 2000 sites, national parks, biosphere reserves, and nature reserves via OGC WMS and WFS services.

name: GovData - Das Datenportal fuer Deutschland
dataType: Government datasets across all sectors: environment, transport, health, economy, science, geospatial, statistics, budgets
formats: CSV, JSON, XML, Shapefile, GeoJSON, PDF, XLS
description: Germany's central open data portal aggregating over 120,000 datasets from federal, state, and municipal administrations via CKAN-based metadata harvesting across all government domains.

name: PEGELONLINE (WSV Water Level Monitoring)
operator: Wasserstrassen- und Schifffahrtsverwaltung des Bundes (WSV) / ITZBund
dataType: Water levels, discharge, water temperature, air temperature at approximately 800 gauging stations on federal waterways
description: Real-time hydrological monitoring system publishing 15-minute water level and discharge data from approximately 800 gauges on German federal waterways with REST API and open data access back to 2000.

name: GDWS Geodatendienste (Federal Waterways Geodata)
dataType: Waterway infrastructure (WInD), water catchment areas, navigable waterway networks, flood zones, waterway classifications
description: Geodata services of the Federal Waterways and Shipping Administration providing WMS/WFS layers for waterway infrastructure, catchment areas, navigation networks, and flood-relevant zones.

name: UBA Daten zur Umwelt (Environmental Data Portal)
dataType: Environmental indicators, climate, water quality, waste, soil contamination, noise, land use, chemicals, emission inventories
description: Comprehensive environmental data portal of Germany's Federal Environment Agency covering climate, water, waste, noise, chemicals, and land-use indicators well beyond the separate air-quality monitoring system.

name: umwelt.info (National Environmental Knowledge Portal)
operator: Umweltbundesamt (UBA) / Nationales Zentrum fuer Umwelt- und Naturschutzinformationen
dataType: Aggregated metadata for environmental protection, nature conservation, climate, biodiversity, water, soil datasets from all German authorities
description: Germany's national search engine for environmental and nature conservation data launched January 2025, aggregating metadata from federal and state authorities into a single discovery platform.

name: LGLN Niedersachsen Open Geodata
operator: Landesamt fuer Geoinformation und Landesvermessung Niedersachsen (LGLN)
dataType: ATKIS Basis-DLM, ALKIS cadastre, orthophotos, DEM (DGM1/DGM5), topographic maps, 3D building models (LoD1/LoD2)
description: Lower Saxony's surveying authority providing open geodata including ATKIS Basis-DLM landscape model, ALKIS cadastre, high-resolution DEM, orthophotos, and 3D building models.
